name: agda-mcp
description: A non-mutating MCP server for Agda's interaction protocol

scripts.build: npm run clean:build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/make-executable.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:compile && node scripts/run-tests.mjs unit
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:compile && node scripts/run-tests.mjs integration
scripts.prepack: npm run test:all && npm run build && npm run smoke
